examples: Water vapour condenses to form clouds.
One of the most powerful of all weather systems, hurricanes are powered by the heat energy released by the condensation of water vapour.

Hydrogen has a high energy density and is clean - burning to leave only water vapour.
You wish that you might become a vapour, and leak away through the lift walls.
